sections.paragraph:
verb למצות

exhaust, use up, utilize to the fullest, extract; drain, wring, squeeze

verb למצות

to epitomize; make the most of; exhaust, study exhaustively

verb מוצה

be extracted; drained; be epitomized; be exhausted, studied exhaustively

verb למצות (>>מיצה)

to extract; drain, wring

masculine noun מיץ

juice, squash
